availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of the Lord's Prayer in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: Confiteor.
THE CONFITEOR.
THE CONFITEOR.
Gloria Patri: the Confiteor
콅rh캐rh캒 -sbil캐l캒mch캣d twal de Sherhk Siam, lilzir kw캡kr twal ki mok stam,
Rarasmilalamched dhual di Sherk-Siam lilhzihu kwerkru dhual kwi boku stab,
x팳팳ax팳asbil'툾alla툾톛b c팳톛d dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab li톫퉋ix퉝 q퉝iq퉢퉝 dx퉝툾al k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 stab,
툾ux팳팳ax팳asbil'툾alla툾톛b c팳톛d dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab li톫퉋ix퉝 q퉝iq퉢퉝 dx퉝툾al k퉝i b톛k퉢퉝 stab,
twalde telh alh Maly skw캐kh캡d durhkalap,
dhual tsde telh halh Mari tskwakred duhkralap,
dx퉝툾al di t톛톫 ha툾톫 Mari ck퉢퉝aqid dx퉝qal톛p,
dx퉝툾al di t톛톫 ha툾톫 Mari ck퉢퉝aqid dx퉝qal톛p,
twald캡 St. Michel alcange, twal d캣 St. Jean Baptiste, twalde les Ap콄tres St. Piere 캡 St. Paul (gwal Sherk Siam Tjussand)
dhual di Sen-Mishel Akash, dhual di Sen-San-Batis, dhunal di Sen-Piel eba Sen-Pol, gwalh Sherk-Siam schiss^ad,
dx퉝툾al di Sen-Mishel Akash, dx퉝툾al di Sen-San-Batis, dx퉝툾al di Sen-Piel 툾ib톛 Sen-Pol, g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sc팳톛sad,
dx퉝툾al di S톛n-Mich톛l Akash, dx퉝툾al di S톛n-San-Batis, dx퉝툾al di S톛n-Pi톛l 툾i ??? S톛n-Pol, g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sc팳톛sad,
ema twal mok tol sherk ass킗lhtam캡rh, klal bass캶sta, twal degwe dsgwa deban (Leplet.)
eba dhual boku gwalh sherk satsilhtalbihu 'tlalba asista dhual dgwe dsgwa deban,
툾ib톛 dx퉝툾al b톛k퉢퉝 g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q s툾aci톫talbix퉝 쿹al퉢b톛as툾ist톛툾 dx퉝툾al d톛g퉝i dsg퉝a툾 dbad,
툾i ??? dx퉝툾al b톛k퉢퉝 tul' s팳톛q 툾aci톫talbix퉝, 쿹al퉢b톛as툾ist톛툾, dx퉝툾al d톛g퉝i dsg퉝a툾 dbad,
T캡캡lh kh캐 tudskwadched atechispetedgwassem,
dhual tih^ilh kra tu tskwadad ate disduhspet^edegwasseb,
dx퉝툾al ti툾i톫 x퉝a툾 tu퉋톛k퉢퉝adad 툾톛 t톛 dsdx퉝sp톛tidg퉝as톛b,
ti툾i톫 qa tu퉋톛k퉢퉝ad c팳톛d 툾톛 dis팳톛툾 sp톛tidg퉝as톛b,
At캡deschgw캐dgw캒d, atedech s킗ayus, atedesch w캡ladsi캐yus,
ate disduhsgwadgwad, ate disduhsiayus eba te wheladisduhsiayus,
툾톛 t톛 dsdx퉝sg퉝adg퉝ad, 툾톛 t톛 dsdx퉝syayus 툾ib톛 t톛 x퉝i툾l톛dx퉝syayus,
툾톛 t톛 dx퉝sg퉝adg퉝ad, 툾톛 t톛 dx퉝syayus, 툾톛 t톛 dx퉝sw톛ladsyayus,
atedsgw캐 skhop derhach (bis). 캒tedsgw캐 ik 캒skh콆p dr캒ch
ate dsgwa askrop drech, ate disgwa askrop drech, ate dsgwa heku askrop drech.
툾톛 t톛 dsg퉝a툾 툾톛sq톛p dx팳톛c팳, 툾톛 t톛 dsg퉝a툾 툾톛sq톛p dx퉝팳톛c, 툾톛 t톛 dsg퉝a툾 hik퉝 툾톛sq톛p dx퉝팳톛c팳.
툾톛 t톛 dsg퉝a툾 sq톛p dx팳톛c팳, 툾톛 t톛 dsg퉝a툾 sq톛p dx팳톛c팳, 툾톛 t톛 dsg퉝a툾 hik퉝 툾톛sq톛p dx팳톛c팳.
Delh sorhot캡캡ch twal ts캡캡lh alh Maly skwakhed duk캐l캒p,
Dilh tsahu otehech dhual tsde telh halh Mari tskwakred duhkralap,
di톫 c톛x퉝 툾utihic팳 dx퉝툾al tsi di t톛톫 ha툾톫 Mari ck퉢퉝aqid dx퉝qal톛p,
di톫 s톛x퉝ut'iwi톫 dx퉝툾al tsi툾i톫 ha툾톫 Mali ck퉢퉝aqid dx퉝qal톛p,
Twal ta St. Mishel alcange, twal ta St. Jean Baptiste,
dhual di Sen-Mishel Akash, dhual di Sen-San-Batis,
dx퉝툾al di Sen-Mishel Akash, dx퉝툾al di Sen-San-Batis,
dx퉝툾al t톛 S톛n-Mich톛l alkash, dx퉝툾al t톛 S톛n-San-Batis ,
twalta St. Pierre ema St. Paul gwalh Sherk Siam chussand
dhual di Sen-Piel eba Sen-Pol gwalh Sherk-Siam schiss^ad
dx퉝툾al di Sen-Piel 툾ib톛 Sen-Pol, g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sc팳톛sad
dx퉝툾al t톛 S톛n-Pi톛l 툾i ??? S톛n-Pol , g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sc팳톛sad
twal mok gwalh Sherhk 캐ss킗lht캒m캡rh
eba dhual boku gwalh sherk satsilhtalbihu
툾ib톛 dx퉝툾al b톛k퉢퉝 g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q s툾aci톫talbix퉝
dx퉝툾al b톛k퉢퉝 g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q s툾aci톫talbix퉝
ema twalh d캣gw캐 d캣b캐n (l캣pl캡t) ,
'tlalba asista dualh dgwe dsgwa deban,
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛s툾ist톛툾 dx퉝툾al d톛g퉝i dsg퉝a툾 d톛bad.
툾i ??? dx퉝툾al d톛g퉝i d톛bad.
chalap tlha t캡캡chtomsh tw캒l d캡 Sherkh-Siam sgwachelh s캡rhs킗캐mchelh (twal tsa)
chalap tlo tehechtobsh dhual di Sherk-Siam sgwachelh sihusiamchelh dhual tsa.
c팳톛l톛p 톫utihic팳tubs팳 dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab sg퉝a툾c팳톛톫 six퉝si툾abc팳톛톫 dx퉝툾al 툾톛ca.
c팳톛l톛p 톫ut'iwi톫tubs팳 dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab sg퉝a툾c팳톛톫 six퉝si툾abc팳톛톫 dx퉝툾al 툾톛ca.
Klob assista
'Tlob asista
쿹'ub 툾톛s툾ist톛툾.
쿹'ub 툾톛s툾ist톛툾.
